objective: Deep architecture research for LazyJob: a lazygit-style job search TUI built in Rust. Produce comprehensive specs covering all aspects of building, running, and evolving this product.

tasks.name: architecture-overview
tasks.description: Research the overall LazyJob architecture. Study lazygit's Go codebase patterns (gocui, panel navigation, keybindings). Study ratatui/rust TUI patterns. Research loom's Cargo workspace architecture. Design the LazyJob crate structure. Write specs/01-architecture.md.

tasks.name: llm-provider-abstraction
tasks.description: Deep dive into the LLM provider abstraction. Study trait-based provider patterns. Design LazyJob's LLM provider layer. Write specs/02-llm-provider-abstraction.md.

tasks.name: life-sheet-data-model
tasks.description: Research and design the life sheet data model. Write specs/03-life-sheet-data-model.md.

tasks.name: sqlite-persistence
tasks.description: Design the SQLite persistence layer. Write specs/04-sqlite-persistence.md.

tasks.name: job-discovery-layer
tasks.description: Design the job discovery and matching architecture. Write specs/05-job-discovery-layer.md.

tasks.name: ralph-loop-integration
tasks.description: Design how ralph loops integrate with the TUI. Write specs/06-ralph-loop-integration.md.

tasks.name: resume-tailoring-pipeline
tasks.description: Deep dive into the resume tailoring pipeline. Write specs/07-resume-tailoring-pipeline.md.

tasks.name: cover-letter-generation
tasks.description: Research cover letter generation. Write specs/08-cover-letter-generation.md.

tasks.name: tui-design-keybindings
tasks.description: Design the TUI in detail. Write specs/09-tui-design-keybindings.md.

tasks.name: application-workflow
tasks.description: Design the full job application workflow. Write specs/10-application-workflow.md.

tasks.name: platform-api-integrations
tasks.description: Research platform API integrations. Write specs/11-platform-api-integrations.md.

tasks.name: interview-preparation
tasks.description: Research interview preparation. Write specs/12-interview-preparation.md.

tasks.name: salary-negotiation
tasks.description: Research salary negotiation. Write specs/13-salary-negotiation.md.

tasks.name: networking-referrals
tasks.description: Research networking and referrals. Write specs/14-networking-referrals.md.

tasks.name: morning-brief-notifications
tasks.description: Design morning brief and notifications. Write specs/15-morning-brief-notifications.md.

tasks.name: privacy-security
tasks.description: Research privacy and security. Write specs/16-privacy-security.md.

tasks.name: ralph-prompt-templates
tasks.description: Design ralph prompt templates. Write specs/17-ralph-prompt-templates.md.

tasks.name: saas-migration-path
tasks.description: Design SaaS migration path. Write specs/18-saas-migration-path.md.

tasks.name: competitor-analysis
tasks.description: Competitive analysis. Write specs/19-competitor-analysis.md.

tasks.name: openapi-mvp
tasks.description: Synthesize all research into OpenAPI MVP. Write specs/20-openapi-mvp.md.

tasks.name: gaps-core-architecture-impl-plan
tasks.description: Create implementation plan for specs/01-gaps-core-architecture.md (gap analysis of 01-04 specs, recommends 15 new specs)
